testResults.name: C:\AiNeed\apps\backend\src\modules\try-on\try-on.service.spec.ts

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow POST /auth/send-code should send SMS code to a valid phone number
assertionResults.title: should send SMS code to a valid phone number

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow POST /auth/phone-register should register a new user with phone and SMS code
assertionResults.title: should register a new user with phone and SMS code

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow POST /auth/phone-register should return 409 when phone already registered
assertionResults.title: should return 409 when phone already registered

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow POST /auth/phone-register should return 401 when SMS code is invalid
assertionResults.title: should return 401 when SMS code is invalid

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow POST /auth/phone-login should login existing user with phone and code
assertionResults.title: should login existing user with phone and code

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow POST /auth/phone-login should auto-register new user on phone login
assertionResults.title: should auto-register new user on phone login

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow POST /auth/phone-login should return 401 when SMS code is wrong
assertionResults.title: should return 401 when SMS code is wrong

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow POST /auth/wechat should login via WeChat OAuth code
assertionResults.title: should login via WeChat OAuth code

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow POST /auth/wechat should return existing user on repeat WeChat login
assertionResults.title: should return existing user on repeat WeChat login

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow Protected endpoint access should access /auth/me with valid token
assertionResults.title: should access /auth/me with valid token

assertionResults.fullName: Phase 1 Integration: Auth Flow Protected endpoint access should reject access without token
assertionResults.title: should reject access without token
